nl_query: Which evaluation policies are currently effective for boards that have at least one script with a pending revaluation request, and show the policy scope, deviation threshold, and review requirement.
failed_sql: SELECT ep.id, ep.board_id, ep.course_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required, ep.third_eval_trigger, b.status AS board_status, b.course_id AS course_id, b.exam_id AS exam_id, b.qp_id AS qp_id FROM evaluation_policy ep JOIN board b ON ep.board_id = b.id JOIN revaluation_request rr ON rr.board_id = b.id WHERE rr.approval_status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY ep.id, ep.board_id, ep.course_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required, ep.third_eval_trigger, b.status, b.course_id, b.exam_id, b.qp_id
